title: Here's Why Investors Should Retain STERIS (STE) Stock for Now
text: Investors are optimistic about STERIS' (STE) robust segmental performance and Cantel Medical buyout.

title: STERIS plc. (STE) CEO Dan Carestio on Q1 2023 Results - Earnings Call Transcript
text: STERIS plc. (NYSE:STE ) Q1 2023 Earnings Conference Call August 3, 2022 10:00 AM ET Company Participants Julie Winter - Vice President-Investor Relations Mike Tokich - Senior Vice President & Chief Financial Officer Dan Carestio - President & Chief Executive Officer Conference Call Participants Chris Cooley - Stephens Matthew Mishan - KeyBanc Michael Polark - Wolfe Research Jason Bednar - Piper Sandler Dave Turkaly - JMP Securities Operator Good morning, everyone and welcome to the STERIS plc First Quarter 2023 Conference Call.

title: Steris (STE) Meets Q1 Earnings Estimates
text: Steris (STE) delivered earnings and revenue surprises of 0% and 5.79%, respectively, for the quarter ended June 2022. Do the numbers hold clues to what lies ahead for the stock?
